matched: This is a catastrophe. My life is over. I will never be happy again.
He who knows he has enough is rich.
he who knows he has enough
You have power over your mind—not outside events. Realize this, and you will find strength.
Do not seek to have everything happen as you wish, but wish for everything to happen as it does.
Give me chastity and continence, but not yet
I’m the responsible one, I’m the creative one, I’m the one who always gets hurt
I study myself more than any other subject. That is my metaphysics, that is my physics.
Where did I go wrong today? Where did I act without integrity? Where did I let my emotions rule me?
I am kind, I am impatient, I am afraid of failure
I love you now, in this moment, and I will not waste this moment worrying about the next.
I will not let you treat me in ways that diminish me, and I will not treat you in ways that diminish you.
I will love you if you love me back, if you stay, if you never hurt me
I will treat you with respect not because you have earned it, but because I have chosen to.
"The greatest thing in the world is to know how to belong to oneself."
"Must the citizen ever for a moment, or in the least degree, resign his conscience to the legislator?"
"No one is free who is not master of himself."
"To subdue one’s self and return to propriety,"
"What is not good for the swarm is not good for the bee."
This has happened, and I will not let it break me—or you
Carpe diem, quam minimum credula postero
If only I had that, if only this would happen, if only things were different.
The wise man does not value life, nor does he despise death.
You could leave life right now. Let that determine what you do and say and think.
because as long as we exist, death is not here. And when it does come, we no longer exist.
a single soul dwelling in two bodies.
He who knows he has enough is rich.
Do not seek to have everything go as you wish, but wish for everything to go as it does.
Perform your duty, but do not seek its fruit.
Virtue is the root; wealth is the branches.
I examine my entire day and go back over what I’ve done and said, hiding nothing from myself, passing nothing by.
The man who knows his own mind is not easily deceived by others.
aequam memento rebus in arduis servare mentem
what am I doing right now?
This matters, even if nothing else does.
The struggle itself toward the heights is enough to fill a man’s heart.
To study the Way is to study the self. To study the self is to forget the self.
You are not your body, not your possessions, not your reputation. You are your capacity to choose.
The wound is the place where the light enters you.
This is here. What will I do with it?
The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way.
You have power over your mind—not outside events. Realize this, and you will find strength.
You are a little soul carrying around a corpse,
I was nothing, I became, I am no more.
What we do now echoes in eternity.
but you are not entitled to the fruits of your actions.
You have a right to perform your prescribed duties,
the gentleman works at what he does not yet know.
it is not the work that enslaves us, but our judgment of it.
